INNOVATIVE GROUNDWORKS SOLUTIONS CELEBRATING 27 YEARS OF CONSTRUCTION EXCELLENCE CONTACT

INNOVATIVE GROUNDWORKS SOLUTIONS

CELEBRATING 30 YEARS OF CONSTRUCTION EXCELLENCE
Contact

CREATING THE RIGHT FOUNDATION FOR GROWTH

Westpoint have established an excellent reputation within the construction industry, providing the right foundations for growth, across all sectors. This is demonstrated by our commitment to achieving high levels of productivity, quality, and pro-active focused approach to health and safety. This is under pinned by our dedication to sustain a positive legacy.

DISCOVER MORE
WATCH OUR VIDEO
Play

OUR ACCREDITATIONS

AWARD WINNERS

WESTPOINT CONSTRUCTION AWARDED MULTIPLE PRIDE IN THE JOB AWARDS

Westpoint Construction are proud to be the first company to simultaneously be awarded a Pride in the Job award for multiple regions East & West Midlands. We are committed to supporting the NHBC guidelines are a fully engaged in future development. Pride in the Job awards recognise the industries best site managers and drive quality in house building for over 35 years. This award represented success for the site manage their team and associated trades as well as setting the standard for the highest quality homes nationwide.

‘’We are proud to have made a significant contribution on the sites that have achieved this recognition.’’
